translations.en: a long haired, raggedy man in stocks.
translations.zh: 一個長髮蓬亂、被套在枷鎖裡的邋遢男子。

translations.en: "@Lenora said I should @stay in these stocks for a while and make sure they work properly."
translations.zh: 「@Lenora萊諾拉說我應該在這枷鎖裡@stay待上一段時間，確認它運作正常。」

translations.en: "I didn't really do anything wrong. I told them to go ahead and put me here anyway, so I could get a different @perspective on @life."
translations.zh: 「我其實沒做錯任何事。但我叫他們不管怎樣把我關進來，這樣我可以從不同的@perspective角度看待@life人生。」

translations.en: "Normally we stumble around through life on our own. But here I can stand still and watch it go by all around me."
translations.zh: 「平常我們各自跌跌撞撞地過日子。但在這裡我可以靜止不動，看著人生在我四周流淌而過。」

translations.en: "The meaning of life? I'm still trying to figure it out myself."
translations.zh: 「人生的意義？我自己也還在摸索。」

translations.en: "Justice may be a @virtue, but I think she carries it too far."
translations.zh: 「正義或許是一種@virtue德行，但我覺得她做得太過了。」

translations.en: "I prefer @Mandrake's version of the eight virtues."
translations.zh: 「我更欣賞@Mandrake曼德雷克版本的八德。」

translations.en: "You should ask him about it sometime."
"Come back and chat again sometime. I'll be right here..."
"Maybe I can talk to you about that after I get out of these stocks."
translations.zh: 「等我從枷鎖裡出來後，也許可以跟你好好談談這個。」

translator_notes: 辛臻是自願坐枷鎖的武士，以枷鎖為人生的觀察台，語氣平靜帶哲思。萊諾拉的正義感太強讓他心生抱怨，但他承認自己是自願的。他對曼德雷克「另類八德」的認同，形成跨 NPC 的幽默互動。
